message:
feat(fj-lax): implement FFT primitives replacing V2 stubs

Add real CPU implementations for Fft, Ifft, Rfft, and Irfft primitives
using naive O(n²) DFT, replacing the previous unsupported_v1_stub errors.

- New fft.rs module with batch-aware 1D DFT/IDFT along the last axis
- Rfft outputs N/2+1 complex bins, Irfft reconstructs real from Hermitian input
- Support for complex64/complex128 I/O and real-to-complex promotion
- Updated tests from stub-error assertions to input-validation checks

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
